title: Timekeeper (Calendar)
description: A simple mod that adds calendars to your world. Now you can find out what day or year your world is!
body:
A networking issue has been found with this mod, causing it to send far too many updates to players on servers. I cannot fix this at the moment & thus this mod is not recommended in instances where bandwidth limits or slow internet are unavoidable!

**Timekeeper** is a simple mod that adds a craftable calendar into your game. The goal is to make creating a world history all that more simpler, by making it possible to actually know the precise day that it is, in a much more immersive & accessible way.

This mod also includes a Real-Time calendar for convenience, and a version compatible with Serene Seasons' 96 day year cycle. Enjoy!

## Types of Calendars...
The first three calculators calculate while the server has been on, allowing an accurate time based on how long the world has been online total. In both MC timescale, and Real timescale.

#### Vanilla
Operates on a 365 Day Calendar of approximately 52 7-day Weeks, in Minecraft-Time 

#### Realtime
Operates on a 365 Day Calendar of approximately 52 7-day Weeks, in Real World-Time

#### Serene (Serene Seasons Compatibility)
Operates on a 96 Day Calendar of approximately 16 6-day Weeks, in Minecraft-Time

#### Localtime
Clones the local-time as reported by the PC, in DD-MM-YYYY Format
